flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Coconino Community College fell 83% between 2006 and 2009 (48.8% → 8.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Coconino Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Coconino Community College fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.5k → $10.2k).
